seoTitle: How to Set Up International Shipping on eBay to Sell Global
metaDescription: Enable international shipping on eBay by choosing between International Standard Delivery, the Global Shipping Program, and custom shipping rates.
intro: Selling to international buyers can meaningfully grow your reach on eBay, and setting it up is more straightforward than it might seem. This guide covers enabling international shipping settings and choosing between eBay International Standard Delivery, the Global Shipping Program, and custom rates. It also touches on shipping zones, customs information, and avoiding the mistakes that lead to delays or cancelled orders.

steps.heading: Enable international shipping settings
steps.body: Turn on international shipping in your eBay seller settings before choosing which shipping method fits your listings.

steps.heading: Choose your shipping method
steps.body: Decide between eBay International Standard Delivery, the Global Shipping Program, or setting your own custom shipping rates.

steps.heading: Set shipping zones and exclusions
steps.body: Define which regions you'll ship to, exclude specific countries if needed, and make sure listings are optimized for global buyers.

steps.heading: Manage customs and delivery details
steps.body: Fill in customs information and estimated delivery times accurately to avoid the delays or cancellations that come from missing details.

faq.question: What's the difference between Global Shipping Program and Standard Delivery?
faq.answer: Global Shipping Program handles international logistics on eBay's end, while International Standard Delivery and custom rates give sellers more direct control over shipping.

faq.question: Can I exclude certain countries from international shipping?
faq.answer: Yes, you can set shipping zones and exclude specific countries you don't want to ship to.

faq.question: What causes delays or cancellations with international orders?
faq.answer: Missing or inaccurate customs information and delivery estimates are common causes of shipping delays and order cancellations.

faq.question: Is international shipping complicated to set up on eBay?
faq.answer: It's more automated than it sounds once shipping zones, methods, and customs details are configured correctly.
